commands: echo '=== WP DEBUG LOG ===' && tail -100 /var/www/html/wp-content/debug.log 2>/dev/null || echo 'NO_DEBUG_LOG'
echo '=== APACHE ERROR LOG ===' && tail -50 /var/log/apache2/error.log 2>/dev/null || echo 'NO_APACHE_LOG'
echo '=== PHP ERROR LOG ===' && tail -50 /var/log/php*.log 2>/dev/null || echo 'NO_PHP_LOG'
